single.text: Submit this week's vendor payments for the US region.
single.reason: Finance Control delegates region:US to the US orchestrator via Caracal; workers inherit the mandate and call submit_payment on mercury through the Caracal gateway.

single.text: Run payouts for Brazil — Wise Payouts rail.
single.reason: FC → BR orchestrator delegation is recorded by the Caracal coordinator; submit_payout runs against wise with the envelope auto-injected by the SDK.

single.text: Execute the end-of-week payment batch for Singapore.
single.reason: Full delegation chain visible in the trace: subject → FC → SG orchestrator → workflow → workers. Every outbound call carries a Caracal mandate.

single.text: Process pending invoices for Germany — match against the ERP and pay.
single.reason: DE orchestrator extracts invoices, matches in NetSuite, settles via Wise. All three providers reached through the Caracal gateway under one delegated identity.

multi.text: Dispatch payouts for US and SG — process all pending vendors now.
multi.reason: FC spawns two regional orchestrators in parallel; Caracal issues two independent delegations with disjoint region scopes.

multi.text: Run payouts for India and Brazil — full pipeline including compliance checks.
multi.reason: Two orchestrators run OCR, compliance, payment in sequence. compliance-nexus is called via gRPC with Caracal metadata; payment via the REST gateway.

multi.text: For SG and US: run compliance, get FX rates, then settle vendor invoices.
multi.reason: Two orchestrators run compliance and FX lookups before settling. FX SSE stream and REST calls all carry the Caracal envelope.

full.text: Process all pending invoices for the US region end-to-end — reconcile, screen vendors, then pay.
full.reason: OCR → ERP match → compliance → submit_payment, each through the gateway under the same US delegation. Every provider call shows the inherited mandate.

full.text: Run the full payout cycle for all five regions.
full.reason: Five regional orchestrators spawn; Caracal records five sibling delegations under Finance Control. Maximum agent fan-out with full lineage in the trace.

full.text: For Germany: extract invoice data, validate vendor compliance, look up withholding rates, then submit payouts.
full.reason: DE orchestrator runs OCR, compliance, tax-rules, then submit_payout via Wise — REST + gRPC + MCP all under one Caracal delegation chain.

full.text: Process invoices for all five regions — reconcile against the ERP, then submit payments.
full.reason: All five orchestrators run NetSuite match then settle on the appropriate rail. Caracal gateway enforces resource policy per region binding.
